title: Kavnai Fort
tagline: Kavnai Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Kavnai Fort is located in a hillock, north of Kavanai village in Igatpuri Taluka of the Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Kavnai Fort is located in a hillock, north of Kavanai village in Igatpuri Taluka of the Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The main gate and a small pond are the only remaining structures.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mukane Dam
topPlaces.description: Mukane Dam, is an earthfill dam on the Aaundha river near Igatpuri, Nashik district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Ghoti Budruk
topPlaces.description: Ghoti Budruk is a census town in Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.It is a special growth center in Nashik Metropolitan Region.Ghoti Budruk, khambale and Dahalewadi together forms a Growth Center.It is the biggest town and market place in Igatpuri.It is also called as mini Mumbai. It is situated on the bank of Darna River.

topPlaces.name: Alwandi Dam
topPlaces.description: Alwandi Dam, is an earthfill dam on Vaitarna river near Igatpuri, Nashik district in state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Upper Vaitarna Dam
topPlaces.description: Upper Vaitarna Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on west flowing Vaitarna river near Igatpuri, Nashik district of Maharashtra state in India. The reservoir created by this dam spreads on both Vaitarna and Godavari rivers catchment area.

topPlaces.name: Tringalwadi
topPlaces.description: Tringalwadi Fort is located in the Igatpuri taluka of Nashik district. It lies on an ancient trade route passing through the Thal Ghat, near the Tringalwadi village.

items.note: Mukane Dam, is an earthfill dam on the Aaundha river near Igatpuri, Nashik district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

Ghoti Budruk is a census town in Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.It is a special growth center in Nashik Metropolitan Region.Ghoti Budruk, khambale and Dahalewadi together forms a Growth Center.It is the biggest town and market place in Igatpuri.It is also called as mini Mumbai. It is situated on the bank of Darna River.
Alwandi Dam, is an earthfill dam on Vaitarna river near Igatpuri, Nashik district in state of Maharashtra in India.

Upper Vaitarna Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on west flowing Vaitarna river near Igatpuri, Nashik district of Maharashtra state in India. The reservoir created by this dam spreads on both Vaitarna and Godavari rivers catchment area.
Tringalwadi Fort is located in the Igatpuri taluka of Nashik district. It lies on an ancient trade route passing through the Thal Ghat, near the Tringalwadi village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kavnai Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kavnai Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kavnai Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (80 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (30 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kavnai Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kavnai Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kavnai Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Kavnai Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kavnai Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mukane Dam, Ghoti Budruk, Alwandi Dam, Upper Vaitarna Dam, Tringalwadi.
